ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Graphics & Design) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category and its offerings */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "about" (
  "about_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each about section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., Careers, Privacy Policy) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content detailing the section's information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the about section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the about section */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author who wrote the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("about_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community feature */,
  "community_type" TEXT /* Type of community feature (e.g., Blog, Forum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community feature and its purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the community feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the community feature */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admin who manages the community feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support type */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support provided (e.g., Contact Support, Help & Education) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the support type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the support type */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Google, Twitter) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the platform's page for followers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the social media integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the social media integration */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freelancers" (
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freelancer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the freelancer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the freelancer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category they specialize in */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the freelancer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the freelancer registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the freelancer's profile */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating of the freelancer */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL to the freelancer's portfolio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the freelancer */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate for the freelancer's services */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status (e.g., available, busy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freelancers_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the client registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the client's profile */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client's company (if applicable) */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL to the client's company website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the client */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* JSON array of category IDs the client frequently uses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client posting the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for project completion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the project has received */,
  "bid_count" INTEGER /* Number of bids received for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project for which the proposal is submitted */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the freelancer submitting the proposal */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Proposed bid amount by the freelancer */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message from the freelancer regarding the proposal */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the proposal was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the proposal was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the proposal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the proposal (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "client_response" TEXT /* Response from the client regarding the proposal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client making the payment */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the freelancer receiving payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the review */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the freelancer being reviewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who provided the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the client about the freelancer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., project update, platform announcement) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., Notification Preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., Enabled/Disabled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
